title: signin api should authenticate user correctly
description: Test the /api/auth/signin POST endpoint to verify that users can sign in with valid credentials and receive appropriate authentication tokens or session information.

title: signout api should terminate user session
description: Test the /api/auth/signout POST endpoint to ensure that user sessions are properly terminated and subsequent requests require re-authentication.

title: session api should return current user session
description: Test the /api/auth/session GET endpoint to verify that it returns the current authenticated user's session details or an appropriate error if no session exists.

title: bookings api should support create read update delete operations
description: Test the /api/bookings endpoints (GET, POST, PATCH, DELETE) to verify CRUD operations for bookings including validation, authorization, and correct data persistence.

title: bookings transition api should handle valid state transitions
description: Test the /api/bookings/{id}/transition POST endpoint to ensure booking state machine transitions are enforced correctly with required conditions and permissions.

title: equipment api should support equipment management and availability check
description: Test the /api/equipment endpoints including CRUD operations and the /api/equipment/{id}/availability GET endpoint to verify equipment availability logic.

title: payments api should list payments and process refunds
description: Test the /api/payments endpoints to verify listing of payments, updating payment details, and processing refunds through the /api/payments/{id}/refund POST endpoint.

title: invoices api should generate and manage invoices
description: Test the /api/invoices endpoints including invoice generation for bookings, retrieval, update, and deletion of invoices with proper validation and financial compliance.

title: clients api should support client management
description: Test the /api/clients endpoints to verify CRUD operations for client records with role-based access control and data validation.

title: reports dashboard api should provide statistics and export functionality
description: Test the /api/reports/dashboard GET and /api/reports/{type} POST endpoints including export functionality to ensure accurate report generation and data export.
